name: Sanderson Design Group plc
summary: Sanderson Design Group plc, a luxury interior furnishings company, designs, manufactures, markets, and distributes furnishings, fabrics, wallpapers, and related products worldwide. The company operates in two segments, Brands and Manufacturing. The Brands segment designs, markets, sells, distributes, and licenses Sanderson, Morris & Co, Harlequin, Zoffany, Anthology, Scion, Clarke & Clarke, and Studio G brands. This segment offers bed linens, towels, rugs, mugs, tableware products, and bathroom accessories; textiles; and trimmings, paints, carpets, and furniture. The Manufacturing segment manufactures wallcoverings and printed fabrics. It also manufactures wallcoverings for third party customers. In addition, the company operates showrooms in Chelsea Harbour, London; and Manhattan, New York. It serves designers, retailers, distributors, and architects. The company was formerly known as Walker Greenbank PLC and changed its name to Sanderson Design Group plc in November 2020. Sanderson Design Group plc was founded in 1899 and is based in Denham, the United Kingdom.
